name: OpenAI Provider
tagline: Use your OpenAI account to power BFrost with GPT models — no local GPU required.
description:
Built-in cloud LLM provider that routes all model calls to OpenAI's API using your API key. Supports GPT-4o, GPT-4, and other available models for chat and tool use.

This is a core infrastructure worker — it ships with every BFrost installation and cannot be removed.
author: @bfrost

versions.changelog: Ships with BFrost. No standalone install needed.
